hooks.command:
CODE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.code // .expression // ""' 2>/dev/null); ERRS=''; echo "$CODE" | grep -qi 'networkidle' && ERRS="${ERRS}BLOCKED: networkidle never resolves on SSE-driven pages. Use browser_snapshot (waits internally) or browser_wait_for with a specific selector.
"; echo "$CODE" | grep -qE 'require\(' && ERRS="${ERRS}BLOCKED: require() does not exist in browser context. browser_run_code runs in the browser, not Node.js. Use Bash tool for Node.js operations.
"; echo "$CODE" | grep -qi 'page\.accessibility' && ERRS="${ERRS}BLOCKED: page.accessibility.snapshot() is deprecated in Playwright MCP. Use browser_snapshot tool instead.
"; if [ -n "$ERRS" ]; then printf "$ERRS" >&2; exit 1; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in */.env|*/.env.local|*/.env.production|*/.env.development) echo 'BLOCKED: Refusing to edit .env file — may contain secrets' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in */pnpm-lock.yaml|*/package-lock.json|*/yarn.lock) echo 'BLOCKED: Lock files must not be edited directly — use pnpm install' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [[ -z "$FILE" || ! "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json)$ ]] && exit 0; npx @biomejs/biome format --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [[ -z "$FILE" || ! "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]] && exit 0; npx @biomejs/biome lint --write "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -5 || true

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in */packages/types/*|*/packages/config/*|*/packages/db/*) pnpm typecheck 2>&1 | tail -10 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac

RESP=$(cat 2>/dev/null || true); if echo "$RESP" | grep -qi 'already in use'; then echo 'RECOVERY: Browser lock collision detected. Wait 5s, call browser_close, wait 2s, then retry your last browser_navigate.' >&2; fi; if echo "$RESP" | grep -qi 'networkidle'; then echo 'RECOVERY: networkidle timeout — SSE pages never reach network idle. Use browser_snapshot instead.' >&2; fi; exit 0
